classes.label: Timepoint
classes.evidence: pd:Timepoint as a subclass of mo:ObservationCollection

classes.label: Observation
classes.evidence: defining pd:Timepoint as a subclass of mo:ObservationCollection, which has an associated set of ssn:Observations.

classes.label: Parameter
classes.evidence: pd:Parameter (representing things that were recorded) as a subclass of ssn:Property

classes.label: Possible Error
classes.evidence: identified as an error it is annotated with 'Possible Error' (PoE)

classes.label: Probable Error
classes.evidence: annotated with 'Possible Error' (PoE) or a 'Probable Error' (PrE); where PrE is more likely to be an error than PoE.

classes.label: Hypertension
classes.evidence: affected by hypertension (91%)

hierarchy.evidence: As a result, secondary insults such as intracranial hypertension, and arterial hypotension have been found to occur, in head injured patients, more frequently than previously realised with more than 90 percent of patients exhibiting one or more insults during their management in intensive care [12].
provenance: The BrainIT group concept and core dataset definition::chunk-11

EtCO2
TCD
PbrO2
Cerebral perfusion pressure (CPP 1/4 BP-ICP) monitoring
antibiotics
nutrition
Eye/mouth care, ET tube suction, bed care
Physiotherapy sessions annotated in ICU management data
Transport to and from Theatre or CT-Scan
